Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-Awaiting EIC Decision across all variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Minimum time it takes for SW-Awaiting EIC Decision to occur after SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average duration of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision when preceded by SW-Reviewer Agreed in complex reviewer assignment variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Time elapsed from SW-AE Recommendation overdue to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Recommendation overdue' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average time from SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that include multiple revision cycles
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Minimum time between the last SW-Reviewer Agreed event and SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in multi-reviewer cases
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average time it takes SW-Awaiting EIC Decision to be followed by a final editorial decision (e.g., SW-EIC Accept, SW-EIC Reject, SW-EIC Major Revision)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Time from SW-Awaiting EIC Decision to SW-EIC Accept compared to time from SW-Awaiting EIC Decision to SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Duration of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants where prior reviewer selection involved repeated declines or reminders
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average time between Manuscript Export Succeeded and SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in submissions that passed plagiarism checks without threshold exceedance
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Total time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in straightforward review paths (no revision loops)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Minimum time from SW-Checklist Completed to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in high-efficiency variants
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Time elapsed between the first occurrence of SW-AE Assign Reviewers and SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in prolonged reviewer assignment scenarios
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'
